query: Walk me through the entire pipeline of this workflow from loading the input image to generating the WEBP video. I want to understand why there are two KSampler stages and how the SVD model conditions the generated frames. Also explain how the LoRA augmentation fits in.

_tags.author_rationale: This query forces a thorough end-to-end explanation of the workflow's structure and the reasoning behind its two KSampler stages and LoRA integration, which is exactly the kind of comprehension test needed for an 'explain' task.
